edge: VIXEN is a technique designed to address the issue of image manipulation
VIXEN summarizes the visual changes between a pair of images in a concise text format.
Image manipulation is a key factor contributing to the spread of fake news.
Misinformation is disseminated through manipulated image content
VIXEN aims to be an intuitively comprehensible tool to help users make quick trust decisions about the authenticity of images.
VIXEN uses a pretrained large language model for generating difference captions.
VIXEN's training is enhanced by using synthetic manipulations from the InstructPix2Pix dataset.
GPT-3 is used to augment the dataset with additional change summaries for improved performance.
The urgency of sharing demands user-friendly tools like VIXEN to facilitate fast trust assessments.
